case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. ALFREDO PANDAY JR ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PANDAY JR, ALFREDO
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 66663390) TO PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
DECLARATION RE: VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 66663390) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200035348), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC SERVED JUL-27-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-28-2021 AS TO DEFENDANT PANDAY JR, ALFREDO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PANDAY JR, ALFREDO $3,487.51 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,937.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,155.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED ($252.43 ON INTEREST, $902.57 ON PRINCIPAL), $.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 210009448) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PANDAY JR, ALFREDO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT PANDAY JR, ALFREDO

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 66663390) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT PANDAY JR, ALFREDO DOES 1 TO 100 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-06-2021
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200036361) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT PANDAY JR, ALFREDO
CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET (TRANSACTION ID # 66663390) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200036361) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100
